rationale: Opening the chart options may provide a “Show data” or “Data labels” feature, making it easy to read exact agent names and counts to find the minimum.

action_text: Hover over the rightmost small bar to see its tooltip
rationale: We need the exact count and agent name for the smallest bar; hovering the far-right small bar should reveal a tooltip with this data.

action_text: Hover over the second-from-right small bar
rationale: If the previous hover doesn’t expose the minimum, hovering the neighboring small bar may reveal another candidate with the minimum count.

action_text: Hover over another small bar near the right end
rationale: Continue identifying minimal bars and associated agents by hovering another adjacent small bar to capture its tooltip.

action_text: Hover over an additional small bar near the right end
rationale: Gathering multiple tooltip readings helps confirm the minimum and list all agents at that minimum threshold.
